training_status: returned to lifting after years away

benefits.description: Adding a lot of muscle, though partially attributed to newbie gains from returning to lifting
Feels great overall on first cycle

protocol_notes: Born with growth hormone deficiency; previously treated with GH as a child but treatment stopped after reaching target height. Cannot get doctors to reinstate treatment. Using low doses of IGF1-LR3 (~20mcg) due to belief that higher doses cause receptor desensitization. Concerned about peptide degradation after reconstitution (30-50 day vial supply). First cycle.
